results.title: Just over 300 votes separating two Galway West candidates based on one tally
results.description: Tallies have put Noel Thomas (Independent Ireland) on 9,512 which is 21% of the first preference vote with Fine Gael’s Seán Kyne pulling in 9,201 which is 20% of first preference votes.
